failures.description: The agent fabricated a cheapest item and price not grounded in the ProductCatalogSearch result.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle using the ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool output at index 3 clearly lists the cheapest item as item_id 1240311797 priced at 137.17. At index 4, the Executor instead introduced item 0000000000 priced at $0.01, which is absent from all prior context and tool output. The agent relied on that fabricated item and price to produce the final answer. This was not resolved later; the Evaluator repeated and approved the same fabricated information.
